tasks.label: run-property-service-local-debug

tasks.label: run-user-service-local-now

tasks.label: mysql-auth-check-now
args: docker exec corecity-mysql mysql -u corecity_user -pcorecity_pass -e "SHOW DATABASES;"

tasks.label: mysql-auth-check-fixed
args: docker exec corecity-mysql sh -lc "mysql -u corecity_user -pcorecity_pass -e 'SHOW DATABASES;'"

tasks.label: mysql-select1
args: docker exec -e MYSQL_PWD=corecity_pass corecity-mysql mysql -u corecity_user -D corecity_db -e "SELECT 1;"

tasks.label: run-user-service-local-jdbc-fixed
args: cd /d c:\Users\FELIX\Documents\corecity-properties\backend && set SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3307/corecity_db?useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=UTC && set SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=corecity_user && set SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=corecity_pass && set SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST=localhost && mvn.cmd -f user-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run

tasks.label: run-user-service-local-jdbc-fixed2

tasks.label: run-user-service-quiet-diagnose

tasks.label: run-user-service-with-dialect
args: cd /d c:\Users\FELIX\Documents\corecity-properties\backend && set SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3307/corecity_db && set SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=corecity_user && set SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=corecity_pass && set SPRING_JPA_DATABASE_PLATFORM=org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect && set SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST=localhost && mvn.cmd -q -f user-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run

tasks.label: run-user-service-clean-log

tasks.label: mysql-list-users-bracketed
args: docker exec corecity-mysql mysql -uroot -pcorecity_root -e "select concat('[',user,']') as user_name, concat('[',host,']') as host_name from mysql.user;"
